ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_1_id" INTEGER /* First type ID of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2_id" INTEGER /* Second type ID of the Pokémon */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total base stats of the Pokémon */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Base HP stat of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_atk" INTEGER /* Base Special Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_def" INTEGER /* Base Special Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Base Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation ID the Pokémon belongs to */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the Pokémon */,
  "has_gender" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon has gender differences */,
  "pr_male" REAL /* Probability of the Pokémon being male */,
  "egg_group_1_id" INTEGER /* First egg group ID of the Pokémon */,
  "egg_group_2_id" INTEGER /* Second egg group ID of the Pokémon */,
  "has_mega_evolution" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon can undergo mega evolution */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "catch_rate" INTEGER /* Catch rate of the Pokémon */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the Pokémon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the Pokémon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_1_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_egg_group_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("egg_group_1_id") REFERENCES egg_groups ("egg_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_2_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_egg_group_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("egg_group_2_id") REFERENCES egg_groups ("egg_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon type */,
  "super_effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is super effective against */,
  "not_effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is not effective against */,
  "resistant_to" TEXT /* Types that this type is resistant to */,
  "weak_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is weak against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon generation */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "egg_groups" (
  "egg_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each egg group */,
  "egg_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon egg group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the egg group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("egg_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that evolves */,
  "evolved_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolved Pokémon */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution */,
  "minimum_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required for evolution */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolved_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolved_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that can learn the move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move's type */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power points of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the trainer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the trainer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_pokemon" (
  "trainer_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer's Pokémon */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the Pokémon */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_pokemon_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_pokemon_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "battle_result" TEXT /* Result of the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)
